metadata.description: Base name for all resources (will be used to generate unique names)
Container image name (azd sets SERVICE_WEB_IMAGE_NAME after each deploy)
Resource group of an existing Foundry (AI Services) account to reuse. Leave empty to provision new.
Name of an existing Foundry (AI Services) account to reuse. Leave empty to provision new.
Name of the existing Foundry chat model deployment (required when using existing Foundry)
Name of the existing Foundry embedding model deployment (required when using existing Foundry)
Name of the Azure AI Search service
Container name for knowledge source data (used by Azure AI Search)
Name of the AI Services (Foundry) account
Search service resource ID to connect
Resource ID of the User-Assigned Managed Identity

properties.description: Foundry Project for Knowledge Retrieval Demo

metadata.description: Name of the existing AI Services account
Name of the Foundry project to create
Search service resource ID to connect
Resource ID of the User-Assigned Managed Identity

metadata.description: Name of the existing AI Services account
Principal ID of the UAMI to grant Cognitive Services User
Principal ID of the Search service system MI (for embedding/OCR during indexing)
Retention period in days for Log Analytics
